rag_rules: Place input assumptions in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Use assign only for output features or auxiliary variables in implementation annexes
Avoid placing guarantees in implementation annexes
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers from the current scope
Avoid direct references to AADL properties in AGREE expressions
Use helper declarations to align assumed and actual types
Use concrete bounds for range comparisons in assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq` for equation declarations and `assign` for implementation bindings
Use `guarantee` for output range guarantees in type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
